intro: Pasania suishaensis, also known as Suisha oak or Pasania, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lauraceae. Research has shown that Pasania suishaensis possesses various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which may help to alleviate symptoms of conditions such as arthritis, wounds, and oxidative stress. The bioactive constituents of Pasania suishaensis include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
